programme.title: Leverage: Redemption

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption
programme.desc: When a woman believes she is being haunted, Sophie leads Breanna and Parker through a con to convince the two real estate scammers responsible to target Leverage HQ.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption
programme.desc: The Leverage team dives into the world of a fantasy collectible card game with a devoted following to take down a pharmaceutical bad boy who is price-gouging drugs.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption
programme.desc: The team takes on a brilliant software developer who is selling a facial recognition system that threatens everyone's privacy except his own.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption
programme.desc: Sophie must keep her feelings in check when she discovers that someone has written a memoir of the team, casting himself as Nate.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption
programme.desc: The Leverage team's Holiday good deed goes awry when their attempt to give a small-town librarian the spy-thriller adventure of a lifetime is interrupted by a shadowy spy organization.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption
programme.desc: The team tries to expose a wellness guru who is selling fake medicines to vulnerable people.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption
programme.desc: The team picks the brain of a legendary grifter and tries to find the loot from her best con before her abusive guardian does.

programme.title: War On Everyone
programme.desc: Two corrupt cops set out to blackmail and frame every criminal unfortunate enough to cross their path.

programme.title: Mad Money
programme.desc: Three female employees of the Federal Reserve plot to steal money that is about to be destroyed.

programme.title: Queenpins
programme.desc: A pair of housewives create a $40 million coupon scam.

programme.title: Life of Crime
programme.desc: Two criminals kidnap the wife of a corrupt developer who is not interested in paying the $1 million ransom.

programme.title: One Day As a Lion
programme.desc: A clumsy hit man hooks up with a waitress, who creates a scheme for them to get cash from her ailing mother.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: Arlington Road [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Widowed when his FBI agent wife is killed by an extremist group, college professor Michael Faraday (Jeff Bridges) becomes obsessed with the culture of these groups -- especially when his new all-American neighbors, Oliver (Tim Robbins) and Cheryl Lang (Joan Cusack), start acting suspiciously. With each twist, the mystery deepens and questions loom whether Faraday is consumed by fear and driven by paranoia, or whether a lethal conspiracy has been born on Arlington Road.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A psychopathic killer is ravaging Memphis, Tennesse by murdering young women and Detective Jacob Stillwell is on the case. Known as the resident tough cop due to his aggressive tactics, he gets knocked sideways when his girlfriend becomes one of the murder victims. With his partner, Storm Anderson, in tow, Jacob casts the rules aside and infiltrates the seedy criminal underworld of the city looking to avenge his lover's death and put an end to the killings.

programme.title: The Air I Breathe [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: A drama based on an ancient Chinese proverb that breaks life down into four emotional cornerstones: happiness, pleasure, sorrow and love.

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: A young woman's world unravels when a drug prescribed by her psychiatrist has unexpected side effects.

programme.title: Arlington Road
programme.desc: Man begins to suspect his neighbors are not what they appear to be and their secrets could be deadly

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen
programme.desc: Terrorists seize the White House; ex-agent fights to save the President.

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: World leaders targeted at London funeral; only one bodyguard can stop it.

programme.title: First Target
programme.desc: The Secret Service attempts to prevent an elaborately plotted assassination attempt on the President.

programme.title: First Shot
programme.desc: A veteran Secret Service agent must thwart an assassin's plan to kill both her and the President.

programme.title: Dirty
programme.desc: Hard-edged story of a gangbanger turned cop who is forced to choose between his conscience and his loyalty to the code of blue all in the course of one day.

programme.title: Panic Room
programme.desc: When her home is invaded by three armed robbers, a divorced woman and her young daughter hide in their specially designed "panic room" but end up in a deadly cat-and-mouse game anyway.

programme.title: Southland Tales
programme.desc: Set in Los Angeles in the year 2008 during a three day heat wave just before a huge 4th of July celebration, an action star stricken with amnesia meets up with an adult film star developing her own reality television project and a Hermosa Beach police officer who holds the key to a vast conspiracy.

programme.title: It Happened To Jane
programme.desc: A Maine widow becomes a cause celebre when she sues a railroad tycoon over the loss of a valuable shipment of lobsters.

programme.title: Anatomy Of A Murder
programme.desc: When his flirtatious young wife (Lee Remick) claims she was raped, an army lieutenant (Ben Gazzara)kills her attacker and hires small-town lawyer James Stewart to defend him.

programme.title: From Here To Eternity
programme.desc: The original Pearl Harbor movie provides a torrid look at military life just prior to the bombing of Pearl Harbor, with remarkable performances from Frank Sinatra, Montgomery Clift, Burt Lancaster, Donna Reed and Deborah Kerr.

programme.title: The Bridge on the River Kwai
programme.desc: Allied commandos are dispatched deep inside the Burmese jungle to blow up a strategic bridge built by British POWs.

programme.title: Jeffrey
programme.desc: This romantic comedy centers on the chaotic love life of Jeffrey, a gay man who swears off sex only to fall in love with his ideal man. Jeffrey's vow of chastity is inspired by a fear of AIDS, a prospect which has started to terrify him so much that he decides he'd be better off never making love again. He is happy and relieved for a time, until he meets Steve, a handsome, charming dreamboat who also happens to be HIV-positive. Jeffrey wants nothing more than to be with Steve, but his anxiety over the disease and fear of commitment stand in the way.

programme.title: Heathers
programme.desc: At Westerburg High where cliques rule, jocks dominate and all the popular girls are named Heather, it's going to take a Veronica and mysterious new kid to give teen angst a body count.

programme.title: Part 1
programme.desc: Acclaimed director Franco Zeffirelli and an all-star cast come together to deliver a powerful adaptation of the Gospels in 1977's Jesus Of Nazareth. From the Nativity to the Crucifixion and Resurrection, the life of Jesus (played by Robert Powell) is presented with stunning depth, gravity, and emotion.

programme.title: Basmati Blues
programme.desc: An idealistic scientist goes to India to sell genetically modified rice, but things change when she falls in love a local farmer and the locale, in this musical romantic comedy.

programme.title: Traffik
programme.desc: A getaway turns to terror after Brea and John accidentally discover the hidden world of a brutal biker gang.

programme.title: Vendetta
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, a detective goes to prison to seek vengeance.

programme.title: Blood Out
programme.desc: Michael goes undercover to take justice into his own hands after his brother is murdered by a gang.

programme.title: I Am Vengeance: Retaliation
programme.desc: Ex-special forces soldier John Gold agrees to retrieve a hated foe in exchange for an expunged record.

programme.title: Dangerous
programme.desc: A reformed sociopath fights to uncover the truth behind his brother’s death.

programme.title: Best Man Dead Man
programme.desc: A bachelor party in the middle of nowhere quickly turns into a night of murder and mystery when the best man ends up with a knife in his head. Everyone is a suspect; only an eccentric private eye in town can solve the mystery.

programme.title: Pinkerton
programme.desc: Allan Pinkerton, founder of America's first detective agency, embarks on a mission to capture the notorious outlaw, Jesse James.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Train to Busan
programme.desc: A man (Gong Yoo), his estranged daughter and other passengers become trapped on a speeding train during a zombie outbreak in South Korea.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Filmmakers showcase the dedication and struggles of kung fu stuntmen and action directors working in Hong Kong cinema during the 1960s-'80s.

programme.title: Max Cloud
programme.desc: When a teenage gamer accidentally opens a portal into her favorite side-scroller, she becomes trapped in a notorious intergalactic prison, home to the galaxy's most dangerous villains. To escape, she must finish the game with a little help from her not-so-savvy friend on the outside -- or remain a 16-bit character forever.

programme.title: Enter the Fat Dragon
programme.desc: A police officer investigates the mysterious death of a suspect who was in his custody during a routine transfer.

programme.title: Nightmare Pageant Moms
programme.desc: Emilia, Sophie enter Mother-Daughter pageant for scholarship in crisis.

programme.title: Nightmare PTA Moms
programme.desc: Gail joins the PTA, only to find it run by power-hungry mom Vanessa.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The Tiffany Rubin Story
programme.desc: It was every parent's nightmare.

programme.title: Nightmare Neighborhood Moms
programme.desc: Charlotte and her daughter Jordan want to start a neighborhood watch.

programme.title: Nightmare Pageant Moms
programme.desc: Emilia, Sophie enter Mother-Daughter pageant for scholarship in crisis.

programme.title: Nightmare PTA Moms
programme.desc: Gail joins the PTA, only to find it run by power-hungry mom Vanessa.

programme.title: A Match for the Prince
programme.desc: A matchmaker risks falling for a real-life prince before his royal wedding date.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Events planner Kelly meets her match in web editor Joe when planning his niece's birthday party.

programme.title: Maria My Love
programme.desc: A young woman named Ana is struggling to deal with her mother's death and her father's mistakes.

programme.title: The Suspect
programme.desc: Beth is wrongly accused of murdering her husband, Paul. Even her step-daughter does not believe her.

programme.title: FBI: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Chapman is an ex-marine in Brazil's slums, battling the yakuza outfit who attacked his sister and left her for dead.

programme.title: The Climb
programme.desc: The breath-taking story of two men ... one with a courageous heart who seeks God; the other with an independent spirit who relies on his own strength.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: CODE
programme.desc: Dallas artist MALIK SCHAEFER, also known as CODE, is a rising star in the underground rap scene. Although his checkered past has led him down the wrong road at times, with the help of his best friend, STYLES, Malik is back on the fast-track to success. That is, until he reconnects with the dangerous love of his life, SOPHIA ORTEGA, who threatens to destroy it all. Malik must decide to either follow his heart or live by the code that has served him well for many years: family over everything.

programme.title: Father Knows Best
programme.desc: Zoe Miles, raised by a controlling father who introduces her to a life of crime, grapples with the lingering trauma of her mother's death. Yearning to embrace the spiritual life she shared with her grandmother, Zoe finds herself trapped in a cycle of violence, forced to rob drug dealers after witnessing a terrifying crime. Desperate to escape this destructive path, she struggles against her father's suffocating control, fearing the loss of his approval and the validation she desperately seeks.

programme.title: Bruised 2
programme.desc: Two years after the death of her husband, Kayla Brown has rebuilt her life following the launch of her successful memoir. she is then visited by a stalker, who is hell-bent on making her pay for what she has done in order to escape her husband.

programme.title: Threaded Lies
programme.desc: When rising fashion designer Dante prepares to launch his brand, haunting messages and resurfaced betrayals from his former partner threaten to unravel everything. As paranoia sets in, Dante must confront the lies he’s built his success on before they destroy him.

programme.title: Love and Deceit 2
programme.desc: Carolyn, a successful businesswoman moves to a new town in hopes of laying down some roots after her divorce. She joins a local women’s group ran by Beverly Jordan a respected therapist to help process her emotions. When in reality, she’s there to rekindle an old flame with a former lover, who happens to be Beverly’s husband.

programme.title: Murder on the Blade
programme.desc: Tobin, a young man with a troubled childhood is currently working through his trauma with a professional counselor. Meanwhile, there is a serial killer on the loose targeting sex workers, and several clues are pointing to both him and his troubled relationship with his mother.

programme.title: Troublesome
programme.desc: Veteran homicide detective Michael reluctantly partners with rookie Derrick. Witnessing a double homicide, they survive a deadly chase, but Derrick is wounded. The suspects are linked to the kingpin, who retaliates by ordering murders across the city. As chaos erupts, the FBI joins the case, revealing the kingpin's identity. Michael finds a weak link, offering a chance to finally catch him.

programme.title: Hansel VS Gretel
programme.desc: Under a spell, Gretel creates a coven of witches. Hansel must fight his twin and the forces controlling her.

programme.title: The Final Level: Escaping Rancala
programme.desc: An arcade manager has to save her brother after he is transported into a video game.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Following the explosion of the Sub, Murphy escapes with Dr. Merch and 10K.

programme.title: Tomb Invader
programme.desc: Determined to find out why her mother disappeared, an adventurer enters the dangerous Tomb of Quin Shi Huang.

programme.title: Alien Predator
programme.desc: A black ops team sent to investigate the crash of an unidentified aircraft is hunted by the former occupants.

programme.title: Troy: The Odyssey
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Trojan War, Odysseus must battle gods and monsters as he journeys home.

programme.title: Nomads (Edited Version)
programme.desc: A French anthropologist intends to settle peacefully in Los Angeles, but a mystical band of deadly evil spirits(lead by Adam Ant)-- the incarnation of nomads he once studied -- materialize to haunt him.

programme.title: The Editor (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Rey Ciso was once the greatest editor the world had ever seen. Since a horrific accident left him with four wooden fingers on his right hand, he's had to resort to cutting pulp films and trash pictures. When the lead actors from the film he's been editing turn up murdered at the studio, Rey is fingered as the number one suspect. The bodies continue to pile up in this absurdist giallo-thriller as Rey struggles to prove his innocence and learn the sinister truth lurking behind the scenes.

programme.title: Beast from Haunted Cave
programme.desc: A giant spider stalks a band of thieves in this schlocky thriller from Gene Corman Productions. The story follows gangster Alexander Ward and his crew as they enlist the help of a local ski-instructor in the heist of several gold bars. But when they use explosives to create a distraction, they disturb the lair of a massive spider! Monte Hellman, the man behind such cult favorites as Two-Lane Blacktop, made his directorial debut with Beast From Haunted Cave. Trivia note: This movie debuted on a double bill with The Wasp Woman.

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leeches
programme.desc: Massive bloodsucking monsters are at large in this Drive-in schlock classic from producers Roger and Gene Corman. The legendary Yvette Vickers (Attack of the 50-foot Woman) stars along with Jan Shepard, Ken Clark, and some nasty giant leeches! Basically, they're just a bunch of actors in plastic costumes, but director Bernard Kowalski (Hot Car Girl, Night of the Blood Beast) made the most of his small budget. When the Cormans wouldn't hire a crew to push the camera raft while filming water scenes in the Pasadena Arboretum, Kowalski put on a bathing suit and did it himself!

programme.title: Tales From The Void
programme.desc: When a mysterious black square appears out of thin air, mistrust grows between neighbors until conspiracies overtake reason.

programme.title: Nightbreed: The Director's Cut (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Boone may be a troubled young man, but his troubles are just beginning. Set up as the fall guy in a string of slasher murders, he decides he'll hide by crossing the threshold that separates us from them and sneak into the forbidden subterranean realm of Midian. Boone will live among the monsters. Includes over 40 minutes of new footage, all mastered in high definition from the original camera negative!

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Japanese Americans are forced to undertake a humiliating exercise that divides the community. Chester comes face to face with a man who forces him to question his very nature. Luz, stricken by grief, is forced to make an important choice.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A story of the past provides insight into the present evil that stalks the Terminal Islanders. Chester returns home to his family. Henry and Asako are faced with a difficult decision.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Nakayamas have been torn apart. Chester searches for the person he believes can help, by any means necessary. An outbreak in the community forces Amy to act, though she's caught between doing what she's told and doing what's right.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Chester and Luz have reached a turning point in their relationship. Amy must take matters into her own hands as she's tormented by a powerful nemesis. Chester meets a boy who gives him answers.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: The Terminal Islanders return home to find that things have changed since they left. The Nakayamas, still tense from the pain they've inflicted on one another, must come together to battle the spirit that threatens their future.

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: Henry and Asako look to the past to provide answers to their current turmoil. Chester and Luz grapple with their identities in hopes of saving those who are dearest to them. Amy and Yamato-san struggle to once again assimilate into American life.

programme.title: The Terror: Devil in Silver
programme.desc: Pepper, a moving man from Queens, is defending his girlfriend Marisol from a violent ex when he's arrested by three plainclothes cops. The cops commit Pepper to New Hyde Psychiatric Hospital for a 72 hour hold. Dr. Walter makes his first appearance.

programme.title: Ruin Me
programme.desc: Welcome to Slasher Sleepout: The Ultimate Horror Movie Experience combining camping, haunted houses, and an escape room into one extreme 36-hour event. Six strangers are hooded, dropped in the middle of the woods, and must survive a simulated horror movie. Alexandra, the only participant who has never even seen a horror film, reluctantly tags along with her boyfriend. But when the other campers start to die before their eyes, Alex becomes the star of her worst nightmares.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Buys the Freeway" - Henry Jones shows up at the Clampett's, pretends to be an old friend and tries to sell the family the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park, and the freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Steals a Wife" - Jed and Duke his dog are both down without a woman in their lives, until they see and pursue a French woman and her poodle that she brought to breed with Mrs. Drysdales dog. Meanwhile Mrs. Drysdale has arranged a "marriage" between the dogs, complete with a decorated bedroom.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Plays Solomon" - Granny can't stand Pearl's yodeling so she reports her to the police. When one of the officers takes Pearl out, Granny thinks she got Pearl in trouble and becomes sad and contrite. Meanwhile, the police find her still, and new trouble results.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's Animals" - When Pearl starts selling music lessons, Mrs. Drysdale complains about the noise to the police. Mrs. Drysdale also calls the dog catcher on Duke.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage" - Mrs Drysdale leaves for a health farm saying Mr. Drysdale is "going to have a new wife," while Mr. Drysdale tells Cousin Pearl he'd like her to keep his house. However, the Clampett's think he's wanting to marry Pearl, so Jed comes up with a plan to "save" the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed's Dilemma" - Grannie and Cousin Pearl are at each other's throats over who's going to take care of cooking and the house, so Jed has to find ways to keep them apart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Rescues Pearl" - Since Mr. Brewster doesn't want to get married, but since the whole county knows that Cousin Pearl had her hat set for him, Jed comes up with a plan for her to save face by having Mr. Brewster proposed in public and then have her turn him down. Jed didn't count on Mr. Brewster's background in the theater and him making a huge production out of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "No Place Like Home" - Back home for Christmas, Elly May bonds with her old animal friends, while Pearl plays the piano for the "new" movie in town (the silent version of Ben Hur) to impress Mr. Brewster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman.

programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: When a rancher dies after the bank forecloses the mortgage on his property, his son blames the banker for his father's death.

programme.desc: A group of outlaws devise a plan to get rid of Lucas so that they can take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: Buchanan Rides Alone
programme.desc: En route back to Texas, Buchanan rides into a California town and becomes embroiled in a violent family fued.

programme.title: 40 Guns To Apache Pass
programme.desc: A heroic cavalry captain singlehandedly puts down a massive Apache rebellion, led by Cochise, soon after the Civil War.

programme.title: The Last Rebel
programme.desc: A rebellious man and his partner, raise a ruckus in a small town after they rescue a man from a lynching.

programme.title: The Man From Colorado
programme.desc: A sadistic judge's lust for blood puts him at odds with his best friend in post-Civil War Colorado.

programme.title: Yellowneck
programme.desc: Location shooting in the Florida Everglades add to this dramatic tale of five Confederate deserters trying to get to Cuba. First, they must overcome snake bites, unfriendly Seminoles, and their own conflicts with each other. How many of the five will actually make it out alive? Lin McCarthy, Stephen Courtleigh, and Berry Kroeger star in this little known example of 1950s independent filmmaking.

programme.title: Six Gun Trail
programme.desc: Legendary cowboy star Tim McCoy stars as Captain William Carson, who along with his sidekick Magpie does battle with jewel thieves. Its an actionfilled drama of the West, with plenty of blazing guns and heman adventure! There are a couple of songs, too, including Moon Over the Plains but they arent sung by Tim McCoy. He was too darned tough to sing! Also starring Nora Lane, Ben Corbet; directed by Sam Newfield.

programme.title: The Lucky Texan
programme.desc: John Wayne stars in this vintage western. He and George Gabby Hayes strike it rich with a gold mine, only to find their lives complicated by women and crooked officials. Things get even messier when the good guys are framed for murder! Its all action here, particularly since legendary stuntman Yakima Cannut stars as one of the films heavies. Who will win the fight over the gold and the girl? Directed by Robert N. Bradbury for Monogram Pictures. Also starring Barbara Sheldon. (The film was also known as Gold Strike River.)

programme.title: Sagebrush Trail
programme.desc: John Wayne plays a man wrongly convicted of murder in this exciting western drama from Lone Star Pictures. You'll enjoy plenty of gun action and thundering hoofbeats as he escapes from jail and then joins a gang, hoping to find the real killer! Director Armand Schaefer (The Miracle Rider, The Lost Jungle) whips up some fine performances from a cast of B-movie favorites, including Lane Chandler (Samson and Delilah) and the great stunt rider, Yakima Canutt. And of course, the film features plenty of fight scenes, made memorable by John Wayne's big swinging' right fist! For film buffs: This was one of 11 films Wayne starred in that year, making 1933 one of the busiest years of Wayne's legendary career.

programme.title: Vengeance Valley
programme.desc: The sons of a Colorado cattle baron, one biological and the other adopted, resent one another and fight for control of their father's cattle empire.

programme.title: Last of the Clintons
programme.desc: Icon of early talking pictures, Harry Carey (Red River), portrays the rugged Trigger Carson, a noble cowboy who infiltrates an outlaw gang in order to expose their rackets. Ordered to kidnap a young girl, his identity is revealed and he is forced to fight his way out of the gang and back to safety. Already 56 by the time he signed on to do this and a series of Westerns for Berke Productions, the stately Carrey (who netted an Oscar nomination four years later) was widely lauded at the time for adding a great deal of maturity and respectability due to his undeniable presence and strong performances.

programme.title: Raiders of Red Gap
programme.desc: Bob's Playin' A Mystery Hand... He's Marked For Death By Killer Bullets As Gunfire Echoes Over The Plains! After one of his ranch hands is killed when a gang attacks his ranch, Jim Roberts joins forces with his neighbor in an effort to fight off the Bennett Cattle Co., a company looking to rob them of their land. Things get increasingly dangerous as the company hires Butch Crane, a professional killer, to stop them. Directed by Sam Newfield (Racing Luck (1935), Go-Get-Em, Haines (1936)), Raiders of Red Gap stars Robert Livingston (The Three Mesquiteers (1936), Larceny on the Air (1937)) as Rocky (Lone Rider) Cameron and Al St. John (Billy the Kid Trapped (1942), Border Feud (1947)) as Fuzzy Q. Jones.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Halloween season, and Carla Hall is making her Banana Pudding Trifle in portable mason jars. She skips the traditional Nilla wafers for buttery Chessmen cookies to keep the crunch. The hosts chat about their favorite Halloween costumes, debate the merits of kitchen gadgets, and deal with Michael's impatience over Carla's loud mixer.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The Halloween celebrations kick off with guest Jeanette Donnarumma, former culinary producer for The Rachael Ray Show. Clinton Kelly attempts a spooky "Cheese Rat" appetizer made from cream cheese, curry powder, and mango chutney. The group laughs at the questionable rat shape, shares TV producer behind-the-scenes stories, and Jeanette shakes up an Apple Cider Margarita spritz.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's cozy comfort food season as Michael Symon cooks a hearty Beef and Butternut Squash Stew. While the meat braises, the hosts share their favorite podcasts to listen to while doing chores, universally bash the idea of the "Turducken", and discuss the possibility of a future Chewed Up cookbook.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's finally Halloween. Michael dresses up as a giant Minion while Carla Hall makes festive Graveyard Dirt Cups. Using a rich chocolate mousse, crushed cookies, and gummy worms, it's the perfect spooky dessert. The trio debates the merits of candy corn, reminisces about retro sweets, and Michael shares a hilarious story of chasing down an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon whips up crispy homemade tater tots with a rich gruyere fondue dip. While frying the tots, the trio gets delightfully derailed when Michael accidentally misspeaks, leading to uncontrollable laughter. A grumpy Clinton complains about his restless legs, Carla relives a past cooking competition disaster, and the group answers fan mail about holiday crafts. The episode wraps with a fan giveaway.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly takes on a true first in his cooking career by attempting homemade corn dogs without any prior test run, bringing a mix of nerves and excitement to the kitchen as Michael Symon and Carla Hall cheer him on. Inspired by a popular recipe from Natasha’s Kitchen, Clinton walks through the batter and frying process in real time, navigating hot oil, technique adjustments, and plenty of playful banter. As the trio discusses their favorite fair foods—from funnel cake to childhood carnival memories—the conversation veers into hilarious territory, including rollercoaster mishaps and food-related regrets. Despite the pressure, Clinton successfully executes the corn dogs, achieving a golden, airy batter that impresses both Carla and Michael. The tasting confirms the dish as a win, with praise for its balanced sweetness, texture, and classic flavor. The episode also features a “Fan of the Day” segment, celebrating Charlene from New York with a personalized shoutout, along with a quick fan mail discussion about music preferences while cooking, revealing everything from Judy Garland to Metallica and R.E.M. The episode wraps on a high note, with Clinton’s confidence restored, the group celebrating a successful first attempt, and the hosts encouraging viewers to engage, subscribe, and bring the fun into their own kitchens.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall shares her ultimate biscuit-making secrets while teaching two different techniques for creating perfect homemade biscuits. Joined by Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly, Carla walks through her trusted biscuit recipe while revealing the small adjustments and baking tricks she has collected over years of cooking, tasting, and learning from other biscuit makers. The conversation centers around how technique can completely transform the same recipe, as Carla demonstrates both drop biscuits baked in muffin tins and laminated layered biscuits made through folding and stacking dough. Along the way, the hosts discuss the importance of cold butter, the role of steam in creating flaky layers, and why full-fat buttermilk makes a major difference in texture and tenderness. Michael and Clinton enthusiastically jump into the science behind baking while keeping the conversation playful, debating butter pockets, crispy edges, and the superiority of muffin-tin stuffing. Carla also shares clever practical tricks, including using oil instead of excess flour on the work surface and flipping biscuit dough for better height and rise. The trio reflects on how cooking competition shows continue to teach even experienced chefs new techniques, reinforcing the episode’s theme that cooking is a constant learning process. After pulling both styles of biscuits from the oven, the hosts compare the textures and flavors of each version while slathering them with butter, jam, and honey. The episode wraps with Carol from Columbus, Ohio being selected as the “Fan of the Day,” earning a personalized message from the hosts before everyone signs off stuffed and satisfied.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: It's Friday dessert day, and Carla Hall is making a comforting Peach Cobbler Pound Cake mashup. While Carla bakes, Michael Symon annoys Clinton Kelly with a deafening hand mixer. The trio discusses their favorite childhood holiday cookies, passionately debates whether black-and-white cookies are actually good, and shares ideas for crazy food mashups. The episode ends with a giveaway of a custom-designed apron from Carla.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In the debut episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon welcomes viewers into his Venice, California front yard alongside his wife Liz Symon and their friend Olivia Annacone Cisic for an unfiltered, laid-back cookout. Celebrating Cinco de Mayo, Michael prepares simple yet flavorful black cod fish tacos on a plancha, walking through his approach to seasoning, cooking fish by sight, and building a bright, crunchy slaw with cabbage, citrus, and charred poblanos. The conversation flows easily as the trio shares cooking tips, debates ingredients like corn versus flour tortillas, and jokes about knife sharpening habits, cilantro preferences, and home cooking realities. Liz complements the meal with a refreshing jalapeño margarita, balancing heat with fresh lime juice, simple syrup, and a hint of orange liqueur, while adding her own creative twist with lemon and bitters. Throughout the episode, the group emphasizes flexibility in cooking—encouraging viewers to adjust flavors, garnishes, and spice levels to their own tastes. Lighthearted banter continues as they assemble tacos, discuss plating ideas, and highlight optional additions like crema and avocado. The episode wraps with a taste test, enthusiastic reactions to both the tacos and cocktail, and a reminder that great food doesn’t have to be complicated—just fresh, simple, and made with joy.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes on the Fan Fridge challenge, cooking from Pat in Peoria's refrigerator. He prepares a beautiful Pan-Roasted Salmon with crispy skin, served alongside a bright Greek-inspired salad of avocado, cucumber, olives, feta, and red curry paste. The crew jokes about Nick's organizing skills and reads fan mail.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Fan Fridge Week wraps up on Friday as Carla Hall transforms leftovers into a decadent Banana Bread French Toast. Using cottage cheese, oat milk, and eggs for a rich custard, she tops the sweet treat with a tart lemonade reduction, fresh berries, and chocolate syrup. The hosts discuss taking the show on the road in a van.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts celebrate their 25th show milestone with guest Chadwick Boyd, who elevates the classic Green Bean Casserole with caramelized onions, fresh beans, and a gruyere drop biscuit topping. While the casserole bakes, the crew debates mashed potato techniques, and Michael shares a hilarious story about how an AI misread his pan wall photo. A fan wins a Caraway pan set.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: A Fan Fridge rescue mission unfolds when a hypothetical Thanksgiving goes wrong. Michael Symon saves the day using Tammy's fridge ingredients to create a savory skillet of chicken thighs, Italian sausage, and sweet peppers. Meanwhile, the hosts share their current TV binges, Michael explains the meanings behind his tattoos, and Clinton sings "Brandy" for a fan. The episode wraps with a giveaway of Carla's measuring bowls.

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Grilled Branzino with Chimichurri: Australian chef Josh Niland shares his masterful fish butchery techniques to elegantly breadown a branzino, perfeclty cook it in a cast iron pan, and serve it with a mouth-watering chimichurri sauce.

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Korean "Drug Eggs" Extremely Addicting Soy Sauce-Marinated Eggs with Rice (Mayak Gyeranbap): Deuki Hong and Matt Rodbard, authors of Koreaworld: A Cookbook, make Mayak Gyeranbap! These sweet, garlicky, soy-infused eggs can be loosely translated as "drug eggs," so named because of their magnetic craveability, a quality they share with their spiritual brethren, Taiwanese tea eggs. The eggs are cooked to a soft and yolky consistency and served over rice as a full meal or by themselves for a robust snack.

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Hetty McKinnon's Eggplant Mapo: Hetty McKinnon, an Australian Chinese cookbook author and James Beard Award finalist, stops by the studio to show Chris Ying how to make her Eggplant Mapo—a delicious twist on Mapo Tofu.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - The 'Mu Shu Denver' and Plum Upside Down Cake: Chris and Andrew (with the help of Andrew's daughter) put together the breakfast crowd-pleaser 'Mu Shu Denver,' an inspired concoction of all the best breakfast foods from the New York Diner episode of Dinner Time Live; Andrew makes the Plum Upside Down Cake from the Summer Menu episode.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Caesar Salad & Fettuccini Alfredo: Chris and Andrew cook two inviting recipes from the Classic Comforts menu of Dinner Time Live: Creamy fettuccine Alfredo and a Caesar salad packed with umami. These classics are a comforting and exceptional balance of heavy and light that will put you at ease.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Lobster, Corn & Melon Salad, Spicy Seafood Boil, Ramen Rockefeller: Andrew makes the refreshing Lobster, Corn & Melon Salad from the Summer Menu episode of Dinner Time Live; Chris and Andrew make the Spicy-Tingly Seafood Boil and Ramen Rockefeller from the Epic Combos episode.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Emeril highlights Creole cream cheese, which was almost lost until one family farm helped save it.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a daughter of a Holocaust survivor for a tour of Thessaloniki's Jewish past and cook up Sephardic recipes, including Huevos Haminados (slow boiled spiced eggs) and Merenza Assada (grilled eggplant with meatballs in tomato sauce). Diane learns about Keftikas de Nogada (meatballs in walnut sauce) and at home, makes Chicken with Prunes.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores medieval English taverns, inns, and alehouses, each serving different roles and social classes. Taverns sold wine, inns provided lodging, and alehouses were private homes selling ale. The episode covers wine quality control, bread and ale laws, and their reputations for gambling and excess. He recreates bokenade, a beef pottage with saffron, cloves, and verjuice.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores the Old West saloon as a social hub for food and drink. He covers its evolving design, popular beverages like whiskey, beer, champagne, and cocktails, gambling games such as poker, and the famous “free lunch” tradition. The episode highlights regional foods, oysters’ popularity, and recreates an 1886 pork and beans recipe from *Cooking for Profit*.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores WWII home front rationing in the U.S., from 1942 sugar limits to the red and blue point system for meat, dairy, and canned goods. He covers price controls, Victory Gardens, labor shortages, internment camps, and black-market “meatleggers.” He also recreates Betty Crocker’s “emergency steak,” a budget-friendly mix of ground beef, cereal, and milk.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Titanic’s luxurious first class, from modest suites to lavish parlor suites with private promenades. He covers dining in the saloon and Ritz, daily meals, amenities like the gym and Turkish bath, and the 10+ course final dinner. Using survivor accounts, he recreates the famous peaches in Chartreuse jelly dessert from April 14, 1912.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores Titanic’s first class breakfast from April 11, 1912, featuring over a dozen dishes by Escoffier. He recreates baked apples, smoked salmon coronets, shirred eggs, and buckwheat cakes with blackcurrant conserve. The episode highlights dining venues, passenger pets, and the tragic story of honeymooners Victor and Maria Josefa Peñasco.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max explores the 4–6 month, 2,200-mile Oregon Trail journey (1846–1869), covering provisions like flour, bacon, and hardtack, cooking over buffalo chips, and staple meals like Johnny cakes. He discusses hunting, trading with Native Americans, celebrations, and hardships, including spoiled food, salt-rising bread, pies, and pioneers leaving possessions at Fort Laramie.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max recreates Ötzi the Iceman’s last meal (c. 3,359–3,105 BC), discovered in 1991. He covers Ötzi’s clothing, tools, health (tattoos, heart disease, parasites), and likely murder by arrow. Using stomach contents—smoked ibex, charred red deer, and einkorn pancake with fiddle ferns—Max cooks over an open fire to mimic Neolithic methods.

programme.title: Tasting History with Max Miller
programme.desc: Max traces airline food from 1919’s first commercial meal to aviation’s Golden Age (1950s–70s). He covers flight kitchens, cold-to-hot meal evolution, themed flights, flight attendant hiring, the 1958 Great Sandwich War, and 1978 deregulation. Max recreates a 1954 United Airlines meal of pot roast, vegetables, Delmonico potatoes, and marshmallow-apple salad.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Ciudad Juárez, Pati joins in with a group of Pachuco dancers, who are passionately preserving this distinctive Prohibition-era culture's traditions. Together they head to the iconic Kentucky Bar, rumored to be the birthplace of the margarita. Later, she savors an icon of Juárez's food scene, the burrito, at Burritos El Compa where the Olivares are keeping their family legacy alive.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: For the indigenous Rarámuri people, long-distance running through Chihuahua's majestic Copper Canyon is a way of life. Pati meets the Moreno brothers, who are famous for winning ultramarathons. In Huetosachi, community leader María Monarca teaches Pati about the art of cooking with corn in Rarámuri cuisine, from nixtamalization to a traditional dish known as "chacales."

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Chihuahua's capital, Chihuahua City, Pati meets the first member of the Rarámuri people to become a world-famous pianist, Romeyno Gutiérrez, who teaches her the basics of Rarámuri music before taking her to his favorite barbacoa spot. Pati's also invited into the home of Chef Ana Rosa Beltrán del Río to cook a few ancient Chihuahuan recipes and learn the art of drying chiles.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati journeys to Casas Grandes to experience the preserved foods, or "conservas," that sustained people during the Mexican Revolution. She meets a family that has lived for generations at Hacienda de San Diego, Mexico's "White House" for a day after the battle of Casas Grandes, including Diana Acosta and her mother, Sara Ramírez, who still preserves food the way they did during the war.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati saddles up for an exhilarating ride into the heart of Chihuahua's ranch and rodeo life. She gets a lesson in roping and riding from rodeo champion Ricardo "Bubba" Nevárez and his friends, then is invited to a post practice carne asada. She also meets Chihuahua's most influential cattle rancher, Álvaro Bustillos, at his Rancho El Arroyo, where the ranch cook serves up some cowboy delicacies.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: In Casas Grandes, Pati rides in style with local art curator Mayte Luján in her 1960s Cadillac. Mayte owns a bed and breakfast, Las Guacamayas, where she invites Pati into the kitchen to make chile con queso in impossibly soft flour tortillas. Later, Pati learns about another tasty export from Chihuahua, pecans, at Gustavo Vázquez's farm, where his family has been growing them for generations.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Madison and Ray are professional van upfitters who have lived in this sprinter van for years. It's built out with a battery bank to a large 700AH system of Battle born lithium batteries, 360w of solar, a 12 volt air conditioner that can run off-grid on their battery system, and a Latte machine cupboard that slides out.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Jo bought a van to live in and use as a bedroom instead of paying rent in Canada's most expensive city. After finding some roof and window leaks during the winter, she decided to invest some money into renovation and repairing this classic camper van. She used creativity and kept her expenses low while still providing the amenities that she needed.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Jason and Kenna live full time on their sailboat which is a Cheoy Lee offshore 41, and they give me a tour around this amazing boat. Jason has been sailing for years and has outfitted sailboats for off shore sailing from BC Canada to Hawaii, and Mexico, but this is what he calls his forever boat. Kenna grew up in the Canadian prairies and never sailed until she met Jason in Victoria BC.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: In this Van tour, James shows us his DIY custom-built mini van camper that he built using recycled materials. He built it as a bug out van and as his fortress of solitude to work on writing short stories. Even though it's only a minivan, he was able to pack in a kitchen, power system, AC unit, and everything else he needs.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Van tour of a custom built DIY camper conversion in a Dodge Promaster van. This Vanlife couple built their Vanlife dream van over 3 months of hard work. Rob, having worked in the confined space of a train for years, wanted to build the van with ideas he had from that experience.

programme.title: Vannin'
programme.desc: Largely thought to have gone the way of the dinosaur, the custom van and its traditions remain alive and well among a small and close-knit group of hardcore custom van owners. Told through the eyes of the event's patrons, this documentary takes you into a unique American subculture.

programme.title: How to Live in a Van
programme.desc: Interviews with 11 different Van dwellers about what it takes to live full-time in a Van. Answering all the biggest questions like "Where to park?" and "How do you go to the bathroom?" but not stopping at the simple answers and actually showing what it is like to live in a van day-to-day. Learn how they have overcome challenges with the hopes of helping you figure out how to live in a van.

programme.title: Homesteading
programme.desc: Ever wondered what it would take to homestead? Follow four homesteaders as they talk about their journeys towards self-sufficiency in the modern day. From three years of experience to thirty, from a farm with animals to a vegan gardener, every homestead is different and in this film we explore what it takes to live off the land.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Sarah and her cat Bodhi have lived in a van for the past two years in western Canada. She gives us a full tour of her classic camper van. Sarah also shares her personal experience about what Vanlife is like for her and why she chose the van that she did.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Electrician builds out a 4x4 sprinter into a modern camper that they are able to both live in and work mobile. This build is done with aluminum and pvc boards, has solar, a composting toilet and everything they need to live comfortably. They also share insights from life on the road.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: Virginia lives in her van full-time. She has been traveling North America in her Ford Transit that she designed herself and helped mostly DIY'ers build. Virginia wasn't sure what she was going to do with her retirement until she learned about van life and decided that designing and building out a van to travel and live in was her next creative project.

programme.title: Alternative Dwellings
programme.desc: John worked with professional van builders to create his high tech sprinter van conversion, equipped with a tiltable solar array, lithium batteries and everything he needs to be a digital nomad and travel in northern Canada. He gives us a tour through his tiny home on wheels and shares what Vanlife means to him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: What is a Carioca? The natives of Rio de Janiero, Brazil are lovable scamps who find ways to avoid work, preferring the beach, flirting, and hanging out at restaurants and bars instead. Tony, under the tutelage of an exemplary Carioca, gives the lifestyle a try.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In New Orleans, Louisiana, Tony catches a Bayou alligator, cools off with a world-famous snow cone, gets in trouble with the law, eats jambalaya with a dancing chef, and relaxes to some local jazz.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony returns to his beloved Hanoi, Vietnam to visit his friend, Linh, for the Vietnamese lunar New Year holiday of Tet. Together they enjoy the holiday and indulge in all the exotic delicacies Vietnamese culture offers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Jumping into a Thai tuk tuk taxi, Tony attempts to soak up Thai culture, and get lost in the cuisine of Chiang Mai, Thailand.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony embarks on a pilgrimage to Sydney, Australia so he may indulge in a meal made by one of the world's best chefs - Tetsuya Wakuda.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY and Provincetown, MA: Experience the formative moments of Tony's career as he revisits his first job, the culinary institute that taught him the basics, a normal workday at Les Halles Brasserie, and his mysterious mentor, Bigfoot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA: New York chef, Anthony Bourdain, descends into the culinary underbelly of his metropolitan nemesis, Los Angeles, where he experiences the trials of celebrity fame and the joys of West Coast cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony travels to the grain-belt capital of Minneapolis, Minnesota to experience firsthand the conflict between creative independent operators and generic franchises.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony sets out to find the real Singapore, with its multicultural restaurants and food markets. He samples prescription food dishes, explores the Geyland Serai Market, and rides the clean and efficient local subway.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Tony returns to his beloved Hanoi, Vietnam to visit his friend, Linh, for the Vietnamese lunar New Year holiday of Tet. Together they enjoy the holiday and indulge in all the exotic delicacies Vietnamese culture offers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: In the Caribbean paradise of St. Martin, Tony eats a healthy Rastafarian meal with a freedom fighter, helps prepare grub for a food caravan, discovers foodstuffs not available at American supermarkets, and finally relaxes at a beach bar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Morocco (Cities): Tony is invited to experience the culinary heart and distinct walled medinas (districts) of the Moroccan city Fes.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Join Tony on his quest to characterize the perfect bar in New York City. Discover the importance of a maniacal bartender, the proper chemical makeup of drinks, the joys of seedy dive-bars, and the need for late-night snacks.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA: New York chef, Anthony Bourdain, descends into the culinary underbelly of his metropolitan nemesis, Los Angeles, where he experiences the trials of celebrity fame and the joys of West Coast cuisine.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Which style of BBQ reigns supreme - Kansas City, Houston, or North Carolina? Tony journeys to all three cities to taste for himself the secrets behind sauces, wood pits, and slow smokers.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Portugal: Portuguese cuisine holds a dear place in Tony's culinary heart. Tony travels to Porto, home of the famous Port wine, where he is immediately exposed to the codfish and the almost mythical place it holds in Portuguese cuisine and culture.
